label: Studio Dentistico

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Italian dental office, 9:15 AM. Dental chair reclined, riunito (dental unit) powered on, mirror instrument already in assistant's hand. The patient has not arrived. Clock on wall showing 9:23, appointment was at 9:00. Dentist in white coat looking out the window. Receptionist checking phone. Empty chair with running cost per minute. Clean clinical interior, morning light, sterile but warm, subtle push-in, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of paper appointment book: 'Bianchi Mario - 9:00' with a cross over it. Hand writing '-200 euro' in the margin. Then: patient file with handwritten anamnesis, one line illegible, faded signature. Sterile clinical light, documentary close-up, shallow DOF, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Ventitre pazienti su cento non si presentano, senza promemoria. Una poltrona vuota costa duecento euro l'ora. E l'anamnesi su carta, allergeni, farmaci, patologie pregresse. Se qualcosa va storto, quella cartella e la tua responsabilita.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Empty dental chair, overhead light on, no patient. Sterile silence. Clinical instruments laid out waiting. Cold blue-white light, still camera, uncomfortable emptiness, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same dental office, chair now occupied by a patient. Dentist working focused. In background, receptionist calm at her desk, looking at monitor serenely. Through window to waiting room: one patient, punctual, sitting calmly. Warm balanced light, professional but human, smooth tracking shot, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, il promemoria parte ventiquattro ore prima. I no-show scendono dal ventitre al sette percento. L'anamnesi digitale e nel profilo paziente. Aggiornata, leggibile, sul tuo computer. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial, blood, graphic medical
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, clean clinical aesthetic, authentic Italian dental practice, professional documentary

music_gen_config.genre_hint: clean professional, modern minimal with piano, clinical confidence

prompts.tense: clinical tension, sparse piano notes, subtle electronic hum, sterile unease, minor key, 75bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: professional confidence, clean piano melody, modern minimal production, trustworthy, major key, 100bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], ogni settimana uno studio dentistico perde dai 2 ai 4 appuntamenti per no-show.
200 euro a poltrona.
Questo li riduce del 70%. [VIDEO]
